allow: Bash(gh pr create --base function --head feature/gmail-login-merge --title 'Add Firebase Auth, chat history, and redesigned sign-in UI' --body ':*)
Bash(gh pr create --base function --head fix/firebase-graceful-fallback --title 'fix: prevent white screen when Firebase env vars are missing' --body ':*)
Bash(gh pr create --base function --head fix/chat-history-auth --title 'fix: chat history 401 on cloud deployment' --body ':*)
Bash(gh pr create --base function --head feat/multi-auth --title 'feat: multi-provider sign-in \(Google, Microsoft, Apple, Phone, Email, Guest\)' --body ':*)
